title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Apollo Telehealth Capital India family as a Frontend Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Apollo Telehealth Capital India:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth Capital India!
